languages.text: "Штрафники были наказаны за непростительную дерзость. Иначе до бунта рукой подать".
"The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."
languages.original_text: "Штрафники были наказаны за непростительную дерзость. Иначе до бунта рукой подать".

traits.locale_text: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."
"The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."
"The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."

languages.text: “那些判罪军人因不可原谅的放肆之举而遭到惩处，他们当时差一点就要暴动了。”
languages.original_text: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."

traits.locale_text: “那些判罪军人因不可原谅的放肆之举而遭到惩处，他们当时差一点就要暴动了。”

languages.text: « Les soldats pénaux ont été punis pour leur insolence impardonnable. Ils étaient à deux doigts de se mutiner. »
languages.original_text: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."

traits.locale_text: « Les soldats pénaux ont été punis pour leur insolence impardonnable. Ils étaient à deux doigts de se mutiner. »

languages.text: "Ceza infaz askerleri, affedilemez küstahlıkları yüzünden cezalandırıldılar. İsyan çıkarmalarına ramak kalmıştı."
languages.original_text: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."

traits.locale_text: "Ceza infaz askerleri, affedilemez küstahlıkları yüzünden cezalandırıldılar. İsyan çıkarmalarına ramak kalmıştı."

languages.text: «Los soldados penales han sido castigados por una insolencia intolerable. Estaban a punto de amotinarse».
languages.original_text: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."

traits.locale_text: «Los soldados penales han sido castigados por una insolencia intolerable. Estaban a punto de amotinarse».

languages.text: "Die Strafsoldaten wurden für ihre unverzeihliche Anmaßung bestraft. Sie hätten um Haaresbreite revoltiert."
languages.original_text: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."

traits.locale_text: "Die Strafsoldaten wurden für ihre unverzeihliche Anmaßung bestraft. Sie hätten um Haaresbreite revoltiert."

languages.text: 「軍法に服さない兵士たちは、許しがたい無礼を働いて罰せられた。暴動寸前だった」
languages.original_text: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."

traits.locale_text: 「軍法に服さない兵士たちは、許しがたい無礼を働いて罰せられた。暴動寸前だった」
